title: Charmed
summary: A charmed creature can’t attack the charmer or target the charmer with harmful abilities or magical effects.

items: A charmed creature can’t attack the charmer or target the charmer with harmful abilities or magical effects.
The charmer has advantage on any ability check to interact socially with the creature.
